title: schefflera pickeringii
intro: Schefflera pickeringii, also known as Philippine schefflera, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae, native to the Philippines. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Philippine schefflera are often used to make infusions and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy.
